description: Incoming LASR Labs Fellow in London.
Presented Tag-Along Attacks at Foresight Vision Weekend UK.
Started working from the Foresight Node Berlin as an independent AI Safety grantee.
Awarded a $22.5k Foresight Institute AI Safety Grant.
Punctuation and Predicates in Language Models accepted to Findings of EACL 2026.
Joined KachmanLab to work on automated red-teaming.
